title: Open Innovation Track: Build Anything on Solana

audit.reason: The provided Solidity code defines a basic ERC721 token contract with some additional functionality to track sold items and prevent reentrancy attacks. The test contract uses Forge's testing framework to validate the minting and security features.
audit.improvements: Consider adding more comprehensive test cases, such as testing edge cases for token ID overflow, ensuring that only the contract owner can mint tokens, and verifying that the contract correctly handles the transfer of tokens.
